task_completion.description: The agent searches the source code to determine which dependencies are actually used.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal commands (like `grep -r`) or IDE search panels showing searches for package names or imports (e.g., `com.google.guava`, `org.apache.commons.io`) within the `src` directory.

task_completion.description: The agent opens the `pom.xml` file for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The `pom.xml` file is visible in a text editor (like nano, vim) or an IDE (like IntelliJ or VS Code).

task_completion.description: The agent removes the unused dependencies from `pom.xml`.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The `<dependency>` XML blocks for `guava`, `commons-io`, `jackson-databind`, `commons-collections4`, and `joda-time` are deleted. This can be seen in the editor or via a `git diff` command.

task_completion.description: The agent keeps the used dependencies in `pom.xml`.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The `<dependency>` XML blocks for `commons-lang3`, `gson`, `slf4j-api`, and `junit` remain intact in the `pom.xml` file.

task_completion.description: The agent verifies that the project still compiles and tests pass after the removals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing a successful Maven build (e.g., `mvn test` or `mvn clean test`) with the message 'BUILD SUCCESS' and indicating that tests were run and passed.

integrity.description: The agent works in the correct project directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal prompt or IDE file explorer shows the path `/home/ga/IdeaProjects/dependency-cleanup`.

integrity.description: The agent does not modify any Java source code.
integrity.visual_evidence: No `.java` files are opened for editing, and no commands are run that modify files in `src/main/java` or `src/test/java`.

integrity.description: The agent runs the tests without skipping them.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Maven command used to test the project does not include flags like `-DskipTests` or `-Dmaven.test.skip=true`.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at `/home/ga/IdeaProjects/dependency-cleanup`. The 5 unused dependencies that must be removed are: `guava`, `commons-io`, `jackson-databind`, `commons-collections4`, and `joda-time`. The 4 used dependencies that must be kept are: `commons-lang3`, `gson`, `slf4j-api`, and `junit`. The agent must not modify any Java source code. A successful Maven test run ('BUILD SUCCESS') is required at the end.
